Simulate Before You Decide

We build simulation models using AnyLogic, Vensim, and Python for governments, industries, and organizations — enabling them to evaluate policies, optimize operations, and validate strategies with confidence, before committing real-world resources.

Book a Call

How We Work

A structured approach to delivering simulation projects that drive measurable outcomes.

01

Dig Deep

We invest time upfront to fully understand your system, constraints, and success criteria — ensuring the model addresses the right questions from day one.

02

Plan

We define the simulation architecture, select the appropriate methodology, and establish clear milestones and deliverables aligned with your objectives.

03

Sprint

We develop, validate, and refine the model through iterative cycles — with regular demonstrations and stakeholder feedback at every stage.

04

Close

We deliver the verified model alongside comprehensive documentation and hands-on training, empowering your team to operate it independently.

Tools & Simulation Methods

We leverage industry-standard platforms and integrate three complementary simulation paradigms to address the full spectrum of modeling challenges.

AnyLogic
Vensim
Python
Power BI

Process-Centric (Discrete Events)

Represents systems as sequences of events that flow through shared resources. Particularly effective for manufacturing processes, logistics networks, service operations, and any environment where entities compete for capacity under constraints.

Agent-Based Modeling

Models autonomous entities that interact with each other and their environment, producing emergent system behavior. Suited for crowd dynamics, market competition, epidemic spread, ecosystem analysis, and scenarios where individual-level decisions shape collective outcomes.

System Dynamics

Captures feedback loops, accumulations, and flows that govern how systems evolve over time. Applied to strategic planning, policy evaluation, macroeconomic forecasting, and understanding the long-term consequences of decisions in complex environments.

Industries & Applications

We apply simulation across a wide range of industries and domains, combining discrete events, agent-based modeling, and system dynamics methodologies.

Available Worldwide

We collaborate remotely with clients across every continent and are available for on-site engagements when your project requires it. Wherever your operations are, our expertise travels with you.

Send a Message

Engagement Models

Flexible pricing structures designed to match the scope and complexity of your project.

Hourly

€200 /hour

Ideal for targeted consultations, technical reviews, or short-term expert support.

  • Direct access to senior consultants
  • Rapid response
  • Flexible scheduling
Become a Client

Daily

€1,500 /day

Dedicated full-day engagement for focused simulation development and in-depth analysis.

  • Full-day dedication
  • Structured deliverables
  • Progress reporting
Become a Client

Monthly

€25,000 /month

Sustained partnership for complex, multi-phase simulation initiatives requiring ongoing collaboration.

  • Dedicated team allocation
  • Priority support
  • Weekly progress reviews
